description: Upload drivers modal or driver profile page (P20_imagen4)
pre_capture_js: (() => { document.querySelectorAll('[data-capture-anchor="p20-image4-target"]').forEach(el => el.removeAttribute('data-capture-anchor')); const modalInner = document.querySelector('gs-modal otto-web-upload-drivers-modal'); const modal = modalInner ? modalInner.closest('gs-modal') : null; const profilePage = document.querySelector('otto-web-driver-profile-page'); const target = modal || profilePage; if (target) { target.setAttribute('data-capture-anchor', 'p20-image4-target'); } })();
